allowed_work: Open a usecase-local KG as a safe editor view.
Render text, JSON or Markdown session views.
Prepare schema-bound patch proposals without real values.
Validate KG patch proposals before pull request creation.
Create pull requests only after explicit human confirmation.
prohibited_work: Store real mandate, client, family, health, estate, property or secret values in Git.
Bypass review for notarial or regulated decisions.
Send local workstation, XNP, card-reader, morris, portal or credential values to public action endpoints.
Treat LLM output as fachliche Wahrheit without validation and review.
day0: Confirm the usecase slug and local repository root.
Confirm the actor is allowed to view the usecase KG.
Confirm no real mandate data will be entered into Git-visible files.
day1: Produce a session sheet or JSON view.
Prepare a patch proposal only if the operator asks for a change.
day2: Review open questions, stale gates and patch drift after usecase updates.
Recertify the plugin boundary when ChatGPT App or GPT Action channels are added.
required_accounts_or_approvals: GitHub pull-request permission for patch creation
Approved reviewer for notarial KG changes
